svg.title: Amend failed terminal output
svg.desc: A terminal-style error box saying the staged fixes could not be amended into the commit.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace
ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Automatic fixes were staged, but the latest commit could not be amended.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', monospace

g.text: Run git commit --amend --no-edit manually after reviewing the staged changes.
